data.name: Hot Girls Gym - Nudist Gym Manager
data.detailed_description:
從零開始打造並管理你自己的健身房！在這款獨特的經營模擬遊戲中，你需要透過策略性地擺放健身器材並搭配合適的裝飾，來設計理想的訓練空間。

你的訪客是自信的女性裸體主義者，她們特別重視平衡與氛圍。

務必始終維持訓練器材與裝飾之間的平衡——只有這樣，滿意度才能保持在高水準，每天都會有更多顧客前來。每一天都重新開始：啟動場景，從滿意的顧客身上賺取收入，並將收益明智地投資於新器材、裝飾或擴建。

但請注意——每一次建造都需要花費金錢。謹慎規劃支出，以維持盈利並持續發展你的健身房。你還可以自由選擇牆壁與天花板顏色，無需額外費用。

當你擴建健身房並新增房間時，將解鎖三溫暖與淋浴設施，你也可以將它們放置在你的裸體健身房中。

data.short_description: 打造並管理你自己的裸體健身房！將健身器材與裝飾品以完美平衡方式擺放，保持女性裸體訪客的滿意度，並提升每日收入。明智規劃支出，讓你的工作室一步步成長。

data.name: Hot Girls Gym - Nudist Gym Manager
data.detailed_description:
Build and manage your own fitness studio from the ground up! In this unique management simulator, you design the perfect training environment by strategically placing fitness equipment and ensuring the right decoration.

Your visitors are confident nudist women who place special value on balance and atmosphere.

Make sure to always maintain a balance between training equipment and decorations – only then will satisfaction remain high and more guests visit your studio every day. Each day starts anew: you launch the scene, earn money through satisfied customers, and wisely invest your income in new equipment, decorations, or expansions.

But be careful – every building unit costs money. Plan your expenses carefully to remain profitable and steadily grow your gym. Further customize your studio with freely selectable wall and ceiling colors – at no extra cost.

If you expand your fitness studio with an additional room, you unlock saunas and showers, which you can then also place inside your nudist gym.

data.short_description: Build and manage your own nudist gym! Place fitness equipment and decorations in perfect balance, keep your female nude visitors satisfied, and increase your daily income. Plan your expenses wisely and let your studio grow step by step.
